allow: Bash(# Check subdirectories that may contain JSONL files for dir in /c/Users/user/.claude/projects/C--Users-user-Desktop-claude-agent-team/*/; do if ls ""$dir""*.jsonl | head -1 | grep -q jsonl; then echo ""### Dir: $dir"" for f in ""$dir""*.jsonl; do echo "" Searching: $f"" node /tmp/extract_jsonl.js ""$f"" 2>&1 done fi done)
Bash(# Let''s look at other project directories in .claude/projects that might have these files ls ""/c/Users/user/.claude/projects/"")
Bash(# Search in the subdirectory JSONL files for conversation-store.ts and healthz find /c/Users/user/.claude/projects/ -name ""*.jsonl"")
Bash(# Now search for next.config.ts and package.json specifically for the claude-agent-team project find /c/Users/user/.claude/projects/ -name ""*.jsonl"")
Bash(# Get the package.json from claude-agent-team main project find /c/Users/user/.claude/projects/ -name ""*.jsonl"")

Bash(# Search all subagents in suspicious-jones for package.json and next.config.ts find ""/c/Users/user/.claude/projects/C--Users-user-Desktop-claude-agent-team--claude-worktrees-suspicious-jones/"" -name ""*.jsonl"")
Bash(# Search all wizardly-faraday subagents find ""/c/Users/user/.claude/projects/C--Users-user-Desktop-claude-agent-team--claude-worktrees-wizardly-faraday/"" -name ""*.jsonl"")
Bash(# Search the C--Users-user directory for all JSONL files to find the main package.json ls ""/c/Users/user/.claude/projects/C--Users-user/"")
Bash(# Search all C--Users-user JSONL files for main package.json and healthz find ""/c/Users/user/.claude/projects/C--Users-user/"" -name ""*.jsonl"")
Bash(# Let''s do a broader raw grep for healthz across all JSONL files find ""/c/Users/user/.claude/projects/"" -name ""*.jsonl"" | xargs grep -l ""healthz"")

Bash(# So healthz is mentioned in context of /api/healthz route - let''s search for Write of a healthz route file find ""/c/Users/user/.claude/projects/"" -name ""*.jsonl"" | xargs grep -l ""api/healthz\\|healthz.*route\\|route.*healthz"")
